review.description: Review current changes for defects and regressions.
review.template: Review the current changes with a code-review mindset. Prioritize bugs, behavioral regressions, security risks, and missing tests. Return findings first with file and line references.

plan-change.description: Create a concise implementation plan before editing.
plan-change.template: Analyze the requested change and produce a concise implementation plan. Include assumptions, likely files to touch, verification steps, and risks. Do not edit files.

checkpoint.template: Create a concise Markdown checkpoint under .project-context/sessions/ using the filename format YYYY-MM-DD_HH-MM-SS_short-slug.md. Include goal, current status, completed work, next steps, open questions, important files, commands run, and risks/notes. Keep it as a checkpoint, not a full transcript.

handoff.description: Write a handoff note for continuing work later.
handoff.template: Create a Markdown handoff note under .project-context/sessions/ using the filename format YYYY-MM-DD_HH-MM-SS_short-slug.md. Prioritize what another session needs to continue safely: current goal, state, important decisions, unresolved questions, exact next actions, important files, and commands already run.

discussion.template: Create a structured discussion document under .project-context/discussions/draft/ using the filename format YYYY-MM-DD_HH-MM-SS_detail-title.md. Include the fixed sections from .project-context/discussions/README.md, mark Status as draft, and use '사용하지 않음' or '현재 없음' for sections that do not apply.
